mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (email, password, name, phone, address, role) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{role, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler})
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, name, phone, address, role, created_at, updated_at FROM members ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, password = #{password}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
